name: Battle for Humanity - Yamo
description:
1524, Feudal Japan, you are the last remaining clan made up of humans, the others having been wiped out by the Toga, a demi-wolf clan that has made their way up to become the Shogunate ruler. As for their first enactment of order - the extermination of humans. You are the leader of your clan, the Toniko, and make your final stand, outnumbered by thousands, prepared to defend your last remaining stronghold. Their leader is Yamo, a fierce wolf girl with a strong with and unbeatable strategies. Will you hold back against the beasts and rise to defeat the demiwolves trying to take over your land? Or will you succumb to their order, doing whatever it takes to escape with your own life like a coward.

I played Total War Shogun 2 and got inspired to do something so out of the blue and random this will probably make no sense whatsoever but B L E S S
creator: BoilingTree
